title: Comparative Politcs of the Middle East
further_info: Recommended Reading Cleveland, W., and Bunton, M. (2025). A History of the Modern Middle East, 7th ed. New York: Routledge. Lockman, Z. (2009). Contending Visions of the Middle East: The History and Politics of Orientalism. Cambridge: Cambridge University Press. Lust, Ellen, and Muasher, Marwan, eds. (2023). The Middle East, 16th ed. London: Sage. Owen, R. (2004). State, Power and Politics in the Making of the Modern Middle East. London: Routledge. Said, E. W. (1978). Orientalism. New York: Pantheon Books. Yom, Sean ed. (2020). Government and Politics of the Middle East and North Africa: Development, Democracy, and Dictatorship. New York: Routledge
